normal.title: Normal
normal.description: Rainfall within +/-19% of average. Routine preparedness, infrastructure maintenance, and regular vulnerability assessments are performed well before monsoon onset to ensure long-term resource stability.

recommendations.text: Infrastructure repair and augmentation (pumps, pipelines, etc.)
recommendations.source: Manual for Drought Management (2020)

recommendations.text: Shift to perennial grasses, legumes, and woody trees
recommendations.source: Developing Farming Systems and Best Practices for Drought-Prone Areas
Plan to Counter the Threats to Municipal Water Supply and Water Reservoirs
Developing Farming Systems and Best Practices for Drought-Prone Areas

elevated.title: Elevated
elevated.description: Triggered by erratic rainfall, moisture stress, or moderate deficits. Tactical mid-season adaptations and contingency plan updates are implemented to help crops survive temporary dry spells.

recommendations.text: Shift to short-duration and less water-intensive crops
recommendations.source: Manual for Drought Management (2020)

recommendations.text: Thinning plant populations and intensive weed management
recommendations.source: Manual for Drought Management (2020)
Manual for Drought Management (2020)

recommendations.text: Replacing rice with alternative drought-hardy crops
recommendations.source: Developing Farming Systems and Best Practices for Drought-Prone Areas

recommendations.text: Use of chemical retardants for evaporation control
recommendations.source: Manual for Drought Management (2020)

severe.title: Severe
severe.description: Significant rainfall deficits exceeding 50% causing economic distress. Focuses on life-saving irrigation, emergency livestock management, and relief employment to prevent widespread asset loss.

recommendations.source: Manual for Drought Management (2020)

recommendations.text: Judicious use of surface and groundwater (Drip/Sprinkler)
recommendations.source: National Disaster Management Guidelines: Management of Drought (2010)
Manual for Drought Management (2020)
National Disaster Management Guidelines: Management of Drought (2010)
Developing Farming Systems and Best Practices for Drought-Prone Areas
El Niño Preparedness and Response Situation Report (2016)

critical.title: Critical
critical.description: Conditions of acute scarcity or confirmed contamination. Requires immediate emergency water supply, nutritional intervention for malnourished populations, and urgent protection against catastrophic resource failure.

recommendations.source: Manual for Drought Management (2020)

recommendations.text: Expansion of ICDS and Mid-Day Meal schemes
recommendations.source: National Disaster Management Guidelines: Management of Drought (2010)
Plan to Counter the Threats to Municipal Water Supply and Water Reservoirs
Plan to Counter the Threats to Municipal Water Supply and Water Reservoirs
Plan to Counter the Threats to Municipal Water Supply and Water Reservoirs
El Niño Preparedness and Response Situation Report (2016)
